category_title: Successful students with high online continuity and regular engagement
scenario_title: Limited linguistic output during communicative practice
minimal_context: The student is posting about their favorite type of music and responding to peers on an online discussion board to practice using the target language.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please post a few lines describing your favorite type of music and then respond to two or three of your peers' postings.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Me gusta la música pop. Mi cantante favorito es Taylor Swift.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, now respond to your peers.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: A mí también me gusta la música pop.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Can you add anything else to your response?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No, I just wanted to indicate that we share the same preferences.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please post a few lines describing your favorite type of music and then respond to two or three of your peers' postings.

STUDENT: Me gusta la música pop. Mi cantante favorito es Taylor Swift.

TUTOR: Okay, now respond to your peers.

STUDENT: A mí también me gusta la música pop.

TUTOR: Can you add anything else to your response?

STUDENT: No, I just wanted to indicate that we share the same preferences.

task.content: describing their favorite type of music or their plans for the weekend

context.environment: classroom time and online discussion boards in blended courses
context.social_setting: respond to two or three of their peers' postings

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When expected to generate rich discussions
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: use of the target language for display purposes, simply indicating whether they shared the same preferences or plans
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: lower-level language students with limited linguistic resources
related_quotes: use of the target language for display purposes rather than to generate rich discussions
simply indicating whether they shared the same preferences or plans

behavior_patterns.condition: During participation in these online exchanges
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: only provided a very limited picture of a student's engagement and interaction with the course
related_quotes: only provided a very limited picture of a student's engagement and interaction with the course
